infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MindfulAI uses your camera for real-time facial expression analysis during AI sessions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MindfulAI uses your microphone for voice interaction with the AI therapist.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MindfulAI needs your location to recommend nearby gyms, therapists, and meditation centers.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: MindfulAI uses health data (heart rate, sleep) to provide accurate mental health context for the AI Therapist.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: MindfulAI securely logs wellness data to your Apple Health ecosystem.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MindfulAI to use your camera for expression analysis.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MindfulAI to access your microphone for voice chat.
